steps.title: Identify the type of growth
steps.content: Each year Antonia’s amount is multiplied by $1 + 0.025 = 1.025$. Since the change is by a constant factor (not a constant amount), the model is exponential rather than linear.

steps.title: Determine if the exponential is increasing or decreasing
steps.content: The factor $1.025$ is greater than $1$, so each year the amount grows. Therefore the exponential is increasing. That matches choice C — C is correct.
